Claude Code Starter Pack: Tools, Tutorials & Resources (P.2)
I crafted this tool list for those looking to build truly life-changing systems with Claude Code.
If I could only have one tool list for building with Claude for the rest of 2026, this would be it.
Over the past 10 months, I've been using Claude rigorously across internal company workflows (7-figure companies), my personal systems, and more.
Simply put, these are the tools that have delivered the highest ROI across those systems, and many of my AI developers have used these.
In P.1, I outlined basic resources to help get you started with Claude Code.
Many people found it helpful, and I recommend reading it if you're new to Vibe Coding.
If you missed it, you can read it here.

Article
Claude Code Starter Pack: Tools, Tutorials & Resources
Your Claude Code workflows are about to get 10x better. This article compiles the top Claude Code resources you need to deploy your best vibe-coded workflows yet. Over the past 2 weeks, I've read 50+...
Here, in part two, I will primarily focus on underrated tools and niche resources for advanced Claude users.
Beginners will definitely find value in these tools once you set up Claude Code and build a few mini projects - bookmark this guide for later if that's you.
Contents
Part I: Advanced Guides - Guides to help you build beyond the basics
Part ll: Prompt Engineering - Tools to help you master prompt engineering inside Claude
Part III: Niche/Underrated Gems - Useful Claude Code tools that nobody talks about
Part IV: Other/Advanced Pro Tips - A compilation of advanced Claude Code pro tips

Part I: Advanced Guides

  1. The Complete Guide to Claude Code V2: CLAUDE. md, MCP, Commands, Skills & Hooks - A banger updated Reddit thread with a TON of free value
https://www.reddit. com/r/ClaudeAI/comments/1qcwckg/the_complete_guide_to_claude_code_v2_claudemd_mcp/
The Complete Guide to Claude Code V2 (updated Reddit thread)
2. How to Use Claude Code - A Guide to Slash Commands, Agents, Skills, and Plug-Ins
https://www.producttalk. org/how-to-use-claude-code-features/
How to Use Claude Code: A Guide to Slash Commands, Agents, Skills, and Plug-Ins
3. Learn Claude Code IN Claude Code - A banger resource that teaches you the ins & outs of Claude Code directly inside Claude Code
https://ccforeveryone. com/
Learn Claude Code IN Claude Code
4. What Actually Is Claude Code's Plan Mode? - A guide that teaches you everything you need to know about planning advanced workflows
https://lucumr.pocoo. org/2025/12/17/what-is-plan-mode/
What Actually Is Claude Code's Plan Mode?
5. The Complete Claude Code CLI Guide - Slash commands, project context, and more
https://github. com/Cranot/claude-code-guide
The Complete Claude Code CLI Guide

Part ll: Prompt Engineering

  1. Prompt Engineering Overview - Anthropics docs to prompt engineering + free resources inside
https://platform.claude. com/docs/en/build-with-claude/prompt-engineering/overview
Prompt Engineering Overview
2. Complete LLM Prompting Mastery Guide - An awesome Claude artifact that summarizes the best practices
https://claude. ai/public/artifacts/290cf5e5-3f06-497d-a6f6-8a03031decf5
Complete LLM Prompting Mastery Guide
3. How we got amazing results from Claude Code (it's all about the prompting strategy) - An experienced dev's guide to Claude prompting
https://www.reddit. com/r/ClaudeAI/comments/1os5khh/how_we_got_amazing_results_from_claude_code_its/
How we got amazing results from Claude Code (it's all about the prompting strategy)

Part III: Niche/Underrated Gems

  1. SkillsMP - A marketplace of 60,000+ Claude Skills
https://skillsmp. com/
SkillsMP
2. Claude Skills Library - A massive repo of Claude Skills for frontend, backend, and more
https://mcpservers. org/claude-skills
Claude Skills Library
3. System Prompts - The exact system prompts used for the latest Claude models
https://platform.claude. com/docs/en/release-notes/system-prompts
System Prompts
4. Claude Code Command Library - Reusable Claude Code commands
https://github. com/Comfy-Org/comfy-claude-prompt-library
Claude Code Command Library
5. SuperClaude Framework - Turns Claude Code into a structured dev platform
https://github. com/SuperClaude-Org/SuperClaude_Framework
SuperClaude Framework

Part lV: Other/Advanced Pro Tips

  1. Claude Code Best Practices That Actually Work - A simple article for optimizing Claude Code
https://dinanjana.medium. com/mastering-the-vibe-claude-code-best-practices-that-actually-work-823371daf64c
Claude Code Best Practices That Actually Work
2. Writing a Good Claude . MD - Pro tips for writing perfect Claude . MD files
https://www.humanlayer. dev/blog/writing-a-good-claude-md
Writing a Good Claude . MD
3. Claude Subreddits - A list of useful Claude Reddit resources
Claude Subreddits
4. Claude Chrome Extension - Most people have no idea this exists, but this Claude extension is handy for browser tasks
Download: https://chromewebstore. google. com/publisher/anthropic/u308d63ea0533efcf7ba778ad42da7390
Claude Chrome Extension
5. Anthropic Academy - Advanced courses for Anthropic API, building with Claude, and more
https://www.anthropic. com/learn
Anthropic Academy

Outro
